description_long: This is a metallic helmet with a rounded, domed crown and a wide, slightly upturned brim that encircles the base. The helmet is predominantly gray with dark, weathered patches, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. A prominent red feather plume, detailed with black veining, is attached to one side and extends upward and backward, adding a striking decorative element. The brim is asymmetrical, with one side appearing slightly more extended and the other side showing a broken or chipped section. The surface is matte with visible rivets and subtle dents, suggesting historical or ceremonial use. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic conquistador or morion helmet, often associated with European soldiers of the Renaissance era.
description: A gray, domed metal helmet with a wide, upturned brim and a bold red feather plume, featuring weathered textures and a battle-worn look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the domed crown, wide brim, and the red feather plume extending from the left side; a broken brim section is visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central ridge of the helmet, the feather plume rising vertically, and the symmetrical curve of the brim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the feather plume attachment clearly visible and the brim's curvature and weathered texture prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full height of the feather plume, the helmet's domed back, and the symmetrical upturn of the brim.
attribute_brim_style: wide, upturned, asymmetrical with a broken section
